description: Save the Wizarding World from Lord Voldemort!

v1.0.0.description:
# Initial Release of Lego Harry Potter 5-7 Archipelago APWorld
The Wizarding World is in peril! Collect the 7 Horcruxes and defeat Voldemort!

## What items and locations are shuffled?
- Spells & Abilities
- Level Unlocks - excluding the bonus level
- Gold Bricks
- Students in Peril
- Red Bricks
- House Crest Pieces
- True Wizard
- Character Tokens
- Shop Purchases

## Required software
- An unmodified copy of the Steam or GOG release of Lego Harry Potter 5-7
  - Note this must be the original version, not the Collection version
- A copy of the APWorld (requires Archipelago version 0.6.7 or higher)
- Reloaded II Mod Loader [Link](https://reloaded-project.github.io/Reloaded-II/QuickStart)
  - Requires .NET 9.0 or higher
- The Lego Harry Potter 5-7 Archipelago Mod [Link](https://github.com/jradcode23/LHP2-Mod/releases)

See the attached setup guide and FAQ guide for instructions on how to set up the AP
v1.0.0.title: Lego Harry Potter 5-7 APWorld v1.0.0

v1.0.1.description:
# Bug Fixes
- Remove Tom Riddle Orphan Playable as a progression item
- Fix Cafe logic so that it is either year 5 completed or year 6 completed
- Make Astronomy tower red brick logically require Y7 or Y8 cause of game bugs
v1.0.1.title: Lego Harry Potter 5-7 APWorld v1.0.1

- Fixed The Flaw in the Plan True Wizard Logic
- Fixed Kreacher Discomforts True Wizard Logic

v1.0.4.description:
# Bug Fix Patch
- Starting inventory is no longer duplicated

- Fixed Arthur Cardigan Logic
- Moved Cho token logic back to Y6

v1.0.4.title: Lego Harry Potter 5-7 APWorld v1.0.4

v1.1.0.description:
# LHP 5-7 APWorld v1.1.0

## New YAML options
- New wincon - levels beaten
   - You can now determine a specific number of levels you want to beat as your wincon
- Faster Duels
   - You can now make it so dueling enemies have 1 heart if turned on
- New Red Brick & Character Token Shuffle Options
   - Tokens only - Collect the token and you don't need to purchase it
   - Purchases only - Collect the token and then purchase the character/red brick to send the check
   - Tokens and Purchases - Existing option (tokens are shuffled into the multiworld)
- Disable Levels
   - If there is a level you really don't want to play or have be part of the multiworld, you can remove it from the itempool
   - This setting is not compatible with Character Purchases Only
   - Please note that any removed levels removes items from the multiworld in the following order 1) Extra Purple studs and then 2) Playable Characters who are considered filler

## Other changes
- Added shortened versions of certain sells names
- Deluminator & Polyjuice are now separate items
- Polyjuice Potion Unlocked location is upon drinking the polyjuice potion in The Seven Harrys
- Tom Riddle Orphan is no longer a Progression character
- Fixed bug with True Wizard logic for Dark Times, Flaw in the Plan, Seven Harrys, & Kreacher's Discomfort
- Made it so your starting inventory doesn't have duplicate items in the multiworld
- Fixed Arthur Cardigan location Logic Bug
- Fixed logic bug with Lovegood's Lunacy regions
- Fixed a logic bug where the generation wouldn't take into account that you can reach Library, Ravenclaw, Astronomy, and Hogsmeade unlocking y7. This only comes into consideration if your way into Y7 and 8 is by completing Y5
- Fixed logic to account for the fact that ministry guard can use the key
- Fixed logic bug with Veilded Threat Ravenclaw crest
v1.1.0.title: Lego Harry Potter 5-7 APWorld v1.1.0

v1.1.1.description: - Fixed bug where generation would error out if joke shops were turned off
v1.1.1.title: Lego Harry Potter 5-7 APWorld v1.1.1 Hotfix
